description: Embark on an unforgettable journey through the heart of Peru, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. This 8-day adventure will take you from the vibrant streets of Cusco, a UNESCO World Heritage site, to the awe-inspiring ruins of Machu Picchu, nestled high in the Andes. Experience the rich culture, indulge in local cuisine, and immerse yourself in the stunning natural beauty that surrounds you. Get ready for an active exploration filled with adventure, history, and unforgettable memories!

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at Jack's Café, known for its delicious pancakes and fresh juices. It's a favorite among locals and travelers alike, providing a cozy atmosphere to fuel up for your adventures ahead.

Stroll through the vibrant Plaza de Armas, the heart of Cusco. Surrounded by stunning colonial architecture, this square is perfect for people-watching and soaking in the local culture. Don't forget to snap some photos of the impressive cathedral!
Head to Mercado San Pedro for lunch, where you can sample local Peruvian dishes. Try the ceviche or a hearty lomo saltado while mingling with locals in this bustling market atmosphere.

Discover the fascinating history of Qorikancha, once the most important temple in the Inca Empire. Marvel at the impressive stonework and learn about the temple's transformation into the Santo Domingo Church.

activities.activity: Coffee Break at Café de la Paz
activities.description: Take a break at Café de la Paz, a charming spot known for its excellent coffee and pastries. Relax and enjoy the view of the bustling streets of Cusco before continuing your exploration.
Wander through the artistic San Blas neighborhood, famous for its narrow streets and artisan shops. This area is perfect for picking up unique souvenirs and enjoying the bohemian vibe of Cusco.

activities.activity: Dinner at Chicha por Gastón Acurio
activities.description: Indulge in a culinary experience at Chicha, a restaurant by renowned chef Gastón Acurio. Enjoy a modern twist on traditional Peruvian cuisine, with dishes made from fresh, local ingredients.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at Jack's Café, known for its delicious pancakes and fresh juices. It's a favorite among locals and travelers alike, providing a cozy atmosphere to fuel up for the day ahead.

Explore the impressive Incan ruins of Sacsayhuamán, located just outside of Cusco. The massive stone walls and stunning views of the city make this a must-see historical site. Don't forget your camera for the breathtaking panoramas!

Head to Mercado San Pedro for a vibrant lunch experience. This local market offers a variety of traditional Peruvian dishes, including ceviche and alpaca meat. Enjoy the lively atmosphere and perhaps pick up some souvenirs while you're there!

After lunch, visit Qenqo, another fascinating archaeological site nearby. Known for its unique rock formations and ceremonial altars, it's a great place to learn about Incan culture and history. The site is less crowded, allowing for a more intimate experience.

Take a short trip to Awana Kancha, a living museum where you can meet and interact with alpacas and llamas. Learn about the traditional weaving techniques of the Andes and enjoy the beautiful surroundings. It's a perfect opportunity for some memorable photos!

activities.activity: Dinner at Chicha por Gastón Acurio
activities.description: End your day with a delightful dinner at Chicha, a restaurant by renowned chef Gastón Acurio. Enjoy a modern twist on traditional Peruvian cuisine, featuring local ingredients and flavors. The ambiance is warm and inviting, perfect for sharing stories of your day's adventures.

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic train ride through the Sacred Valley.

activities.description: Start your adventure at the impressive Ollantaytambo ruins, a key archaeological site with stunning terraces and temples. The views of the surrounding mountains are breathtaking, making it a perfect spot for photos.
Savor a delicious Peruvian lunch at Apu Veronica, known for its local dishes and cozy atmosphere. Try the alpaca steak for a unique taste of the Andes!
Travel to Chinchero, a charming village famous for its traditional weaving and stunning views of the Andes. Don't miss the colorful market and the beautiful colonial church.
Meet friendly alpacas at a local farm in Chinchero. Learn about these fascinating animals and even take some memorable photos with them!

End your day with a delightful dinner at El Albergue, known for its farm-to-table dining experience. Enjoy fresh ingredients sourced from local farms while soaking in the beautiful views of the valley.

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic train ride through the Sacred Valley.

activities.description: Start your adventure with a guided tour of the breathtaking Machu Picchu. Explore the ancient ruins and learn about the fascinating history of the Inca civilization.
Enjoy a delicious buffet lunch at Tinkuy, located near the entrance of Machu Picchu. Savor a variety of Peruvian dishes while taking in stunning views of the surrounding mountains.
For the adventurous, hike up Huayna Picchu for a panoramic view of Machu Picchu. The trail is steep but offers breathtaking vistas that are worth the effort.
After a day of exploration, take the bus back down to Aguas Calientes. Relax and enjoy the beautiful scenery along the way.
Indulge in a delightful dinner at Indio Feliz, a charming restaurant known for its fusion of Peruvian and French cuisine. Don't miss their famous alpaca steak!
Take a leisurely evening stroll through the quaint streets of Aguas Calientes. Enjoy the vibrant atmosphere and perhaps pick up some souvenirs from local shops.

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic train ride back to Cusco, taking in the breathtaking views of the Andes.

activities.description: Savor a delicious vegetarian meal at Green Point, known for its fresh ingredients and local flavors. A great way to recharge after your journey!
Visit the stunning Cuzco Cathedral, a UNESCO World Heritage site. Marvel at its intricate architecture and rich history, showcasing the blend of Inca and colonial influences.
Explore the Inca Museum, where you can learn about the fascinating history and culture of the Inca civilization through various artifacts and exhibits.
Wander through the charming streets of San Blas, known for its artisan shops and vibrant atmosphere. Don't miss the chance to pick up unique souvenirs!

activities.activity: Dinner at Chicha by Gastón Acurio
activities.description: Indulge in a culinary experience at Chicha, where you can enjoy contemporary Peruvian cuisine crafted by renowned chef Gastón Acurio. A perfect way to end your day!

transit.memo: Flight to Puerto Maldonado to start the Amazon adventure.

activities.description: Upon landing in Puerto Maldonado, you'll be greeted by the lush greenery of the Amazon rainforest. Prepare for an exciting journey ahead as you head to your lodge.
Enjoy a scenic boat ride along the Tambopata River to reach your Amazon Lodge. Keep an eye out for wildlife along the way!
Savor a delicious lunch featuring local ingredients and flavors, prepared by the lodge's chefs. A perfect way to recharge after your journey.
Join a knowledgeable guide for a walk through the Amazon rainforest. Discover the incredible biodiversity, including exotic plants and animals, and learn about the ecosystem.
Experience the culture of the local indigenous community. Engage with the locals, learn about their traditions, and perhaps even try your hand at traditional crafts.
Enjoy another delightful meal at the lodge, featuring local dishes that highlight the flavors of the Amazon region.
As night falls, embark on a guided night walk to spot nocturnal wildlife. Listen to the sounds of the jungle and keep your eyes peeled for creatures like frogs and insects.
After an adventurous day, return to the lodge to relax and share stories with your friends. Enjoy the sounds of the Amazon as you unwind for the night.
Enjoy a hearty breakfast at the lodge, featuring local fruits and traditional Peruvian dishes to fuel your adventure ahead.
Embark on a guided wildlife tour through the lush Amazon rainforest. Keep your eyes peeled for exotic birds, monkeys, and other wildlife in their natural habitat.
Return to the lodge for a delicious lunch, featuring fresh ingredients sourced from the surrounding rainforest.
Experience the thrill of walking high above the forest floor on the canopy walkway. Enjoy breathtaking views of the treetops and the chance to spot wildlife from above.
Meet and interact with friendly alpacas at a nearby farm. Learn about their significance in Peruvian culture and enjoy some photo opportunities with these adorable animals.
Catch your flight back to Cusco, where you can relax and reflect on your Amazon adventure.

activities.activity: Dinner at a Local Restaurant in Cusco
activities.description: Savor a traditional Peruvian dinner at a local restaurant, featuring dishes like ceviche and lomo saltado, to end your day on a delicious note.

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic drive back to Cusco.

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at Jack's Cafe, known for its delicious pancakes and fresh juices. It's a favorite among locals and travelers alike, perfect for fueling up before your last day in Cusco.

activities.activity: Last-minute shopping at San Pedro Market
activities.description: Explore the vibrant San Pedro Market, where you can find local handicrafts, fresh produce, and souvenirs. It's a great place to pick up unique gifts and experience the local culture.
Enjoy a delicious lunch at La Bodega 138, famous for its wood-fired pizzas and cozy atmosphere. It's a great spot to relax and reflect on your adventures in Peru.
Discover the fascinating history of Qorikancha, once the most important temple in the Inca Empire. The impressive architecture and beautiful gardens make it a must-visit site in Cusco.
Take a break at Cafe Ayllu, a charming cafe known for its excellent coffee and relaxing ambiance. It's the perfect place to unwind before your departure.
Prepare for your journey home, taking with you unforgettable memories of Machu Picchu and the beauty of Peru.
